title: Praktikum Strategie, Prozessentwicklung und Projektmanagement (6 Monate | Sept/Okt 2026)
required_skills: Active student enrollment in engineering (Maschinenbau, Elektrotechnik, Informatik, Medizintechnik, Produktionstechnik, Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen, Mechatronik)
Organizational talent and structured work style
matched_skills: English C1 — strong English proficiency matches the very good English requirement
Organizational and coordination skills — demonstrated through HSBC 6-workstream PMO
Stakeholder coordination — cross-functional coordination experience from multiple roles
Strategic PMO orientation — Stryker mentions PMO as the internship context
missing_skills: Active student enrollment in engineering — Boru is not a student and has Management/PR degrees not engineering
German language at required level (B1 only)
core_responsibilities: Support Strategic PMO team in controlling and developing transformation and development projects
Gain insight into strategy implementation and synergy identification
Collaborate with international teams on new product development projects
Support project managers for new product introductions (NPI)
Coordinate across development, production, quality, and procurement stakeholders
recommended_emphasis: PMO governance experience from HSBC as strategic project office context
C1 English for international team collaboration
summary: Scoring 12.5, this is a poor match. This is a 6-month engineering student internship in Stryker's Advanced Operations team — requiring enrollment in a technical/engineering program. Boru Lai has Management and PR/Advertising master's degrees and is a working professional, not an engineering student. Application is not recommended; the role is structurally and educationally misaligned.
